subject: [PATCH v2 7/9] mm: percpu: per-node kmem accounting for obj_exts metadata

2026-06-26.patch_summary: This patch adds per-node kmem accounting for obj_exts metadata in the Linux kernel's mm/percpu.c file. The obj_exts array is vmalloc'd and its pages may reside on different nodes, so it walks these pages to add each page's slice to the correct node's byte accumulation. This ensures that each node is rounded up to whole pages only once, across payload and metadata combined.
